every trivial push.

text:
Yes. README.md already references `CI_AUTOMATION.md` in two places (committed in `1f30942` on branch `docs/ci-automation-prompt`, PR #9):

| README.md line | Text |
|---|---|
| 100 (doc table) | `\| [CI_AUTOMATION.md](CI_AUTOMATION.md) \| Prompt + reference workflow to regenerate .repospec.json in CI on worthy commits \|` |
| 57 (quick-start step 4) | "…To regenerate it automatically on structurally-significant commits, follow [CI_AUTOMATION.md](CI_AUTOMATION.md)." |

So README got both a table-of-docs entry and an inline pointer in the "Maintain" step. `PROMPT.md` was also wired up (intro line + resources list). All three changes are in PR #9 — nothing further needed unless you want me to scaffold the actual `.github/workflows/repospec.yml`.
